name: Oatmeal Lacies 1930
recipeInstructions:
1. Use either quick or regular rolled oats (not instant type).
2. Cream sugar and shortening well.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients.
5. Add to the creamed mixture and stir until combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls 2-3 inches apart onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately after removing from the oven.
9. These will be soft initially but will become harder as they cool.
Note: Makes 3-4 dozen Pat Dwigans.
